title: Lawn looks amazing
description: Marcus showed up right on time and left my yard looking better than it has in years. Edges were crisp and he bagged everything. Will book again.

title: Solid and reliable
description: Good work overall, lawn was mowed evenly. Ran about 15 minutes late but sent a text ahead of time, which I appreciated.

title: Highly recommend
description: Very thorough and friendly. Even swept the clippings off the sidewalk without being asked. Great value for the price.

title: Spotless move-out clean
description: Sarah deep cleaned my apartment top to bottom before my move-out inspection and I got my full deposit back. Kitchen and bathrooms were immaculate.

title: Best cleaner I've hired
description: Detail-oriented and trustworthy. She noticed things I would have missed and left the place smelling fresh. Booking her weekly now.

title: Great job, minor scheduling hiccup
description: The clean itself was excellent. Only reason it's not five stars is we had to reschedule once, but the results spoke for themselves.

title: My son finally gets pre-algebra
description: Jordan is patient and explains concepts in a way that clicks. My 7th grader went from dreading math to feeling confident before his exam.

title: Fantastic tutor
description: Always prepared with practice problems and genuinely cares about progress. Highly recommend for any middle-school math help.

title: Very knowledgeable
description: Clearly knows the material and is good with kids. Video sessions occasionally had connection issues but nothing major.

title: Fixed the leak fast
description: Emily diagnosed the leak under my sink in minutes and had it repaired within the hour. Clean, professional, and fairly priced.

title: Good work
description: Faucet no longer drips and the repair looks solid. Had to wait a day for a part but she kept me updated the whole time.

title: Kids adored her
description: Priya was wonderful with our two little ones. Followed the bedtime routine exactly and sent us a couple photos so we could enjoy our evening.

title: Trustworthy and warm
description: Punctual, responsible, and great with kids. The house was tidy when we got home and both kids were already asleep. Will absolutely rebook.

title: Strong and efficient
description: Tom helped move a heavy couch and a mattress up a flight of stairs without complaint. Careful with the walls too. Would hire again.

title: Lifesaver on moving day
description: Showed up ready to work and had the whole truck loaded faster than I expected. Super friendly and handled everything with care.

title: Stunning bridal look
description: Jasmine did my wedding hair and makeup and it lasted the entire day through happy tears and dancing. The trial beforehand made me feel so at ease.

title: Beautiful work
description: Really talented and professional. Makeup was flawless. Ran slightly behind schedule but the final result was worth it.

title: Perfect box braids
description: Aaliyah is a true artist. My braids are neat, even, and not too tight. She was quick without rushing and the whole vibe was relaxing.

title: Best braider in town
description: Booked her twice now and she's consistent every time. Great with styling advice too. Highly recommend.

title: TV mounted perfectly level
description: Greg mounted our TV over the fireplace and hid all the cables cleanly. Knew exactly where the studs were. Good, tidy work.

title: Handy and dependable
description: Fixed a sticking door and assembled two dressers in one visit. Fast, careful, and friendly. My go-to handyman from now on.

title: Assembled everything quickly
description: Hana put together a bookshelf and two dressers without any leftover screws. Cleaned up the boxes afterward too.

title: Flower beds look incredible
description: Diane weeded and mulched my front beds and they look professionally landscaped now. Clearly knows her plants.

title: Great gardening help
description: Did a thorough job on the weeding. Beds look great. A little pricier than I expected but the quality made up for it.

title: Chemistry finally makes sense
description: Andre broke down stoichiometry so my daughter could actually follow it. Her test scores jumped after just a few sessions.

title: Reliable grocery delivery
description: Margaret picks up my weekly groceries like clockwork and always brings everything right inside. So dependable and kind.

title: My dog loves her
description: Laura walked my Lab twice a day while I was slammed at work. Sent updates each time and my dog was happy and tired. Wonderful.

title: Great with pets
description: Very caring and reliable dog walker. Walks were a touch shorter than agreed a couple times but my pup was always happy.

title: Clean fade at my door
description: Elijah came to my place and gave me the best fade and beard lineup I've had in a while. Super convenient and professional.

title: Toilet fixed same day
description: Frank replaced the fill valve and it stopped running immediately. Straightforward and knew what he was doing.

title: Wonderful weekly cleaner
description: Olivia is consistent and detailed. My house has never stayed this clean. She's become part of our routine and we love her.

title: Patient reading tutor
description: Carla is so encouraging with my 2nd grader. His reading fluency has really improved and he actually looks forward to their sessions.
